form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 6th (Fr4) over 1609m at Bunbury beaten 35 m by Diamond Bay (1:53.50) in 4yo+ NR up to 59 M on April 4 at $26. At her previous start 5th (Fr1) over 2130m after showing early pace at Gloucester Park beaten 5.5 m by Flying Felix (2:37.60) in 4yo+ 1-3 WINs on February 17 at $3.30. Has a nice draw and is expected to figure prominently.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke gait leaving the back straight final occasion.
Checked and broke gait leaving the front straight on the first occasion.
Raced roughly at various stages throughout.

form.formComment: Returns after four months in the paddock. Finished off last campaign when sixth after a quick start, behind En Pariant Sur at Pinjarra over 2185m in a 4yo+ NR 45 to 55 on December 8 at $10. Nicely drawn and likely to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 8th (Fr1) over 2180m after showing early pace at Wagin, beaten 25 m by Beyond Bling (2:45.20) in 4yo+ NR up to 59 on March 27 at $9. Showed ability the outing before when she won by a nose as favourite when quickly away, (Fr3) at this track (2:11.60) beating Rising Spirit in 4yo+ NR up to 45 on March 20 at $2.65. Will be about the money.
